label: Gas properties
description: Properties for gas things controlling spread rate, roofed behavior, and vacuum requirements.

dissipationRate.label: Dissipation rate
dissipationRate.description: Thickness units removed per game tick as the gas spreads and dissipates.

roofedDissipationRateFactor.label: Roofed dissipation rate factor
roofedDissipationRateFactor.description: Multiplier applied to dissipation rate when the gas is in a roofed cell.

needsVacuumToExist.label: Needs vacuum to exist
needsVacuumToExist.description: If true, this gas only exists in cells with no atmosphere pressure.
